parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_dept_market (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  dept TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  total_budget_m NUMERIC,
  addressable_m NUMERIC,
  addressable_pct TEXT,
  source TEXT,
  naics_codes TEXT,
  refresh_source TEXT DEFAULT 'GDA.sched.dept-market-refresh',
  last_updated TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

parameters.jsCode:
const depts = [
  { dept: 'Department of War', total_budget_m: 882600, addressable_m: 44130, source: 'FY2026 NDAA P.L. 119-60', naics_codes: '541330,541511,541512,541611,541715' },
  { dept: 'Department of Homeland Security', total_budget_m: 62200, addressable_m: 6220, source: 'FY2026 DHS Appropriations', naics_codes: '541511,541512,541519,541611' },
  { dept: 'Department of Veterans Affairs', total_budget_m: 369300, addressable_m: 7386, source: 'FY2026 VA Budget Request', naics_codes: '541511,541512,541611,611430' },
  { dept: 'Department of Energy', total_budget_m: 55400, addressable_m: 5540, source: 'FY2026 DOE NNSA Budget', naics_codes: '541330,541511,541715' },
  { dept: 'Department of Justice', total_budget_m: 40100, addressable_m: 2005, source: 'FY2026 DOJ Budget', naics_codes: '541511,541512,541519' },
  { dept: 'Missile Defense Agency', total_budget_m: 16200, addressable_m: 8100, source: 'FY2026 NDAA MDA + Golden Dome $25B', naics_codes: '541330,541511,541715,541690' },
  { dept: 'Department of State', total_budget_m: 58200, addressable_m: 2910, source: 'FY2026 State/USAID Budget', naics_codes: '541511,541611,541990' },
  { dept: 'Intelligence Community', total_budget_m: 73100, addressable_m: 14620, source: 'FY2026 NIP estimate', naics_codes: '541511,541512,541519,541715' },
];
return depts.map(d => ({ json: { ...d, addressable_pct: ((d.addressable_m / d.total_budget_m) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%' } }));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gda_dept_market (dept, total_budget_m, addressable_m, addressable_pct, source, naics_codes, last_updated)
VALUES ('{{ $json.dept }}', {{ $json.total_budget_m }}, {{ $json.addressable_m }}, '{{ $json.addressable_pct }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.naics_codes }}', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (dept) DO UPDATE SET
  total_budget_m = EXCLUDED.total_budget_m,
  addressable_m = EXCLUDED.addressable_m,
  addressable_pct = EXCLUDED.addressable_pct,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  naics_codes = EXCLUDED.naics_codes,
  last_updated = NOW();

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { status: 'dept_market_refreshed', departments_upserted: items.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), source: 'GDA.sched.dept-market-refresh' } }];
